---
title: "Figure 5 — sample vs correlation distortion (Gaussian), macro_IR"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
The sample/correlation decomposition of IR's residual distortion, computed with the GAUSSIAN Fisher (so the
short-Delta corner is not contaminated by numeric-FD noise). Scalars (Frobenius, on the 4 params on/off/i/N_ch):
  sample      = || Gaussian_Sample_Distortion  -  I ||        (per-interval non-Gaussianity)
  correlation = || Gaussian_IDM - Gaussian_Sample ||          (cross-interval part; no Gaussian_Correlation
                                                               component exists, so reconstruct it)
Two scales govern the geography (three-domain idea reduces to two):
  N_ch     -> multinomial (channel count)      -> SAMPLE, roughly a horizontal band N_ch < 30
  N_ch.Δ   -> transition-count discreteness     -> CORRELATION, a diagonal N_ch.Δ < 1 (NOT vertical: the
                                                   correlation COEFFICIENT is ~Δ/τ and N_ch-independent, but
                                                   its non-Gaussian DISTORTION follows N_ch.Δ).
Overlaid: dashed N_ch.Δ = 1, dotted N_ch = 30. Faceted kind x noise.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
```

```{r data}
# both distortion matrices are ~ identity when there is no distortion, so the signal is the departure from I.
# SAMPLE uses the Gaussian FIM (Gaussian_Sample_Distortion); CORRELATION is FIM-free (no Gaussian twin: the
# Fisher does not enter it), so use Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion directly -- NOT IDM - sample (that
# would fold the Fisher back in).
SMP <- "Probit_statistics_Gaussian_Sample_Distortion"
COR <- "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion"
PI  <- c(0, 1, 2, 5)
NOISES <- c("0.1", "1", "10")

rd <- function(z) rbindlist(lapply(Sys.glob(sprintf(
  "../data/1c2ae6f/figure_3_G_nch_*_nsim_10000_macro_IR_noise_%s_battery_sim_G.csv", z)), function(p) {
    d <- fread(p, skip = 1)
    d[component_path %in% c(SMP, COR) & statistic == "value" & probit == "mean" &
        param_index %in% PI & param_col %in% PI,
      .(component_path, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_index, param_col, value)]
  }))[, noise := z]
d <- rbindlist(lapply(NOISES, rd))
d[, ck := paste(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau)]
idx <- function(p) match(p, PI)

res <- d[, {
  mat <- function(cp) { M <- matrix(0, 4, 4); s <- .SD[component_path == cp]
                        M[cbind(idx(s$param_index), idx(s$param_col))] <- s$value; (M + t(M)) / 2 }
  I4 <- diag(4)
  S <- mat(SMP); C <- mat(COR)
  .(sample = sqrt(sum((S - I4)^2)), correlation = sqrt(sum((C - I4)^2)),
    noise = noise[1], Num_ch = Num_ch[1], interval_in_tau = interval_in_tau[1])
}, by = ck]

dd <- res %>% as_tibble() %>%
  pivot_longer(c(sample, correlation), names_to = "kind", values_to = "v") %>%
  mutate(lx = log10(interval_in_tau), ly = log10(Num_ch),
         kind = factor(kind, levels = c("sample", "correlation"),
                       labels = c("sample  (per-interval)", "correlation  (cross-interval)")),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)))

BR  <- c(0, 0.03, 0.06, 0.1, 0.15, 0.2, 0.3, 0.45, 0.7)
PAL <- colorRampPalette(c("#f7fbff", "#fee0d2", "#fcae91", "#fb6a4a", "#de2d26", "#a50f15", "#67000d"))(length(BR) - 1)
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.4, fig.height = 5.0}
X_BRK <- log10(c(.01, .1, 1));           X_LAB <- c(".01", ".1", "1")
Y_BRK <- log10(c(10, 100, 1000, 10000)); Y_LAB <- c("10", "100", "1e3", "1e4")

g <- ggplot(dd, aes(lx, ly, z = v)) +
  geom_contour_filled(breaks = BR) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = PAL, drop = FALSE, name = "distortion\n(Frobenius)") +
  geom_abline(slope = -1, intercept = 0, colour = "grey15", linewidth = .45, linetype = "dashed") +   # N_ch.Δ = 1
  geom_hline(yintercept = log10(30), colour = "grey15", linewidth = .45, linetype = "dotted") +       # N_ch = 30
  geom_point(size = .45, colour = "grey30", alpha = .5) +
  facet_grid(kind ~ noisef) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = X_BRK, labels = X_LAB) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = Y_BRK, labels = Y_LAB) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-2, 0), ylim = c(1, 4)) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = expression(N[ch]),
       title = "macro_IR: sample distortion (Gaussian FIM) vs correlation distortion (FIM-free)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 7.5), legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.key.size = unit(.32, "cm"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8), plot.title = element_text(size = 9.5, face = "bold"))
g
ggsave("Figure_5_decomp_gaussian.pdf", g, width = 7.4, height = 5.0)
```
